title: ResourcePackExtractor
description: Fabric 1.21.11 mod that allows extracting server resource packs in-game.
body:
# ResourcePackExtractor

**ResourcePackExtractor** (or Resource Pack Extractor) is a Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.11** that allows you to extract server resource packs directly from within the game.

## What it does
- Lets you save and extract any resource pack a server sends you.
- Works even with **corrupted or protected packs**, which are often used by servers to prevent unpacking.
- Adds an easy-to-use button in the resource pack selection screen for quick extraction.
- Provides direct access to the extracted folder from within Minecraft.

## Why you should use it
- No need for external tools, everything happens inside Minecraft.
- Useful for learning, customizing, or analyzing how servers design their packs.
- Bypasses broken or obfuscated resource packs that normally can’t be opened, while still keeping them usable.

## Important Information ⚠️
While this mod enables the extraction of **protected or corrupted resource packs**, the extracted content may still be subject to copyright.  
You are responsible for how you use the extracted files. Please use this mod responsibly and at your own risk.
